series_metadata.series_title: Reasonable Accommodation Committee Requests for Accommodations and Decisions
series_metadata.series_description: Requests for accommodations submitted to the committee, clarification, and additional information provided in support of requests for reasonable accommodations, and official documentation of the committee’s decision on a request for a reasonable accommodation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: five years end of employment
